---
title: "MLB Player Scouting Report"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
params:
  player_name: "Aaron Judge"
  player_type: "Hitter"
  season: 2025
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
library(gt)

source("../R/scouting.R")

hitters <- readRDS("../data/processed/hitters.rds")
pitchers <- readRDS("../data/processed/pitchers.rds")

player_name <- params$player_name
player_type <- params$player_type
season <- params$season
```

# Player Overview

```{r}
if (player_type == "Hitter") {
  player <- hitters |> filter(player_name == params$player_name)
} else {
  player <- pitchers |> filter(player_name == params$player_name)
}

player |>
  select(any_of(c(
    "player_name", "team", "pa", "ip", "hr", "rbi", "avg", "obp",
    "slg", "ops", "w_rc_plus", "era", "fip", "whip", "k_9", "bb_9", "war"
  ))) |>
  gt()
```

# Percentile Profile

```{r}
if (player_type == "Hitter") {
  scouting_df <- make_hitter_scouting(hitters, player_name)
} else {
  scouting_df <- make_pitcher_scouting(pitchers, player_name)
}

scouting_df |> gt()

plot_percentiles(scouting_df, player_name)
```

# Summary

```{r}
top_metric <- scouting_df |>
  arrange(desc(Percentile)) |>
  slice(1)

low_metric <- scouting_df |>
  arrange(Percentile) |>
  slice(1)

cat(paste0(
  "**", player_name, "** ranked highest in **",
  top_metric$Metric,
  "** with a percentile score of **",
  top_metric$Percentile,
  "**. Their lowest relative area was **",
  low_metric$Metric,
  "** with a percentile score of **",
  low_metric$Percentile,
  "**."
))
```
